calendar.matters:
Notice Of Hearing Of Petition For Writ Of Administrative Mandamus And Complaint For Declaratory Relief
Off Calendar Dec-11-2012 Off Calendar

Notice Of Hearing Of Petition For Writ Of Administrative Mandamus And Complaint For Declaratory Relief
Off Calendar Dec-03-2012 Continued To Jan-10-13 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 302
MINI MINUTES: No appearance on this matter. The Court adopted its tentative ruling as follows: PETITIONER T & A DROLAPAS & SONS, LP'S Petition For Writ Of Administrative Mandamus And Complaint For Declaratory Relief is continued to January 10, 2013. The respondent shall provide a courtesy copy of the opposition and the petitioner shall provide a courtesy copy of the reply with department 302 by December 7 per San Francisco Local Rule 2.6B. The parties shall please attach a cover letter to those papers indicating the new hearing date. Judge: A. James Robertson II; Clerk: Lesley Fiscella, Not reported.

(Renotice) Of Hearing Of Petition For Writ Of Administrative Mandamus
Off Calendar Dec-14-2012 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: Appearances - Atty. David Wasserman of Wasserman-Stern (415-567-9600) appearing for petitioner T & A Drolapas & Sons, LP moving party.
Atty. Wayne Kessler Snodgrass of Office of the City Attorney (415-554-4675)appearing for respondent S.F. Residential Rent Stabilization.

Argued- Court having reviewed the pleadings and have heard oral argument. PETITIONER T & A DROLAPAS & SONS, LP's Renotice Of Hearing Of Petition For Writ Of Administrative Mandamus is taken under submission. Both parties prepare statement of decision. Judge Ronald E Quidachay, Clerk K. Liu, CSR Barrie Hart (415-328-6644).
